modeling_status.reason: WIP/unverified reference record. The source image is clean enough for a manual trace, and local discussion records solution metrics, but this package does not yet contain an audited terminal netlist or replayable solution.
modeling_status.next_step: Trace the colored-wire components into pin-to-pin transitions for the seven visible recursive blocks, verify crossing/junction conventions, then solve the recursive Port Graph and record the discovered transition sequence.

notes: Image source is mathpuzzle.com DaedRecursive.gif, referenced in local discussion notes.
Local discussion says a hand solution was found with chip depth 6 and 42 chip-entry/exit steps, but does not provide the path.
Visible drawing appears to contain blocks 1 through 7 plus minus/plus terminals; terminal ordering and connectivity remain unverified.
